label: Transparent alpine meadow motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Alpine Meadow transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete alpine wildflower meadow motif isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: Vivid blue gentian-like blossoms, small snow-white flowers, fresh grass-green leaves and stems, tiny snow crystals, crisp high-mountain botanical texture, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, no shadows, gradients, texture, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no pot, no hand, no insects, no horizon, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Alpine Meadow light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn board named Morphous Alpine Meadow, derived from blue alpine wildflowers, snow whites, grass greens, glacier blues, and high-mountain clarity.
Required visible sections: palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, planning board, calendar, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and motif usage.
Style: clear planning system for roadmaps, schedules, field notes, task queues, and operational dashboards with airy snow surfaces, gentian blue controls, grass green support states, and 8px radii.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Alpine Meadow dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode translation of Morphous Alpine Meadow with alpine ink and midnight rock surfaces, snow foregrounds, gentian blue controls, meadow green support states, glacier blue accents, and high-mountain clarity.
Required visible sections: dark palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, planning board, calendar, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and motif usage.
